title: Biofuels/Biodiesel Technology and Product Development Managers
description: Define, plan, or execute biofuels/biodiesel research programs that evaluate alternative feedstock and process technologies with near-term commercial potential.

tasks.text: Design or conduct applied biodiesel or biofuels research projects on topics, such as transport, thermodynamics, mixing, filtration, distillation, fermentation, extraction, and separation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze data from biofuels studies, such as fluid dynamics, water treatments, or solvent extraction and recovery processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, or oversee the preparation of, experimental plans for biofuels research or development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical or scientific guidance to technical staff in the conduct of biofuels research or development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Propose new biofuels products, processes, technologies or applications based on findings from applied biofuels or biomass research projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct experiments on biomass or pretreatment technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare biofuels research and development reports for senior management or technical professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop lab scale models of industrial scale processes, such as fermentation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee biodiesel/biofuels prototyping or development projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct experiments to test new or alternate feedstock fermentation processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop methods to estimate the efficiency of biomass pretreatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform protein functional analysis and engineering for processing of feedstock and creation of biofuels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to breed or develop energy crops with improved biomass yield, environmental adaptability, pest resistance, production efficiency, bioprocessing characteristics, or reduced environmental impacts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop computational tools or approaches to improve biofuels research and development activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop separation processes to recover biofuels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design chemical conversion processes, such as etherification, esterification, interesterification, transesterification, distillation, hydrogenation, oxidation or reduction of fats and oils, and vegetable oil refining.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or execute solvent or product recovery experiments in laboratory or field settings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop methods to recover ethanol or other fuels from complex bioreactor liquid and gas streams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
